query:
SELECT 
  a.id,
  w.name as worker_name,
  a.demand_id,
  a.scheduled_start,
  a.scheduled_end,
  a.scheduled_hours,
  a.actual_start,
  a.actual_end,
  a.actual_hours,
  a.status
FROM assignments a
JOIN workers w ON a.worker_id = w.id
WHERE w.name LIKE '%孔仁琳%'
  AND a.scheduled_start >= '2026-03-07 00:00:00'
  AND a.scheduled_start < '2026-03-08 00:00:00'
ORDER BY a.scheduled_start;
